---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

## Dr. Cory William Dugan

**PhD · AFHEA** — Nutrition researcher & biostatistician specialising in iron deficiency, women's health, and clinical trial design.

```{=html}
<div class="cv-chip-row" style="margin: 0.8rem 0 1.5rem;">
  <span class="cv-chip">Postdoctoral Research Fellow · Pennington Biomedical</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Research Officer · UWA</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Adjunct Research Fellow · Curtin University</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Founder · HolisticHer</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Director · P∆R∆DOX Health & Wellbeing</span>
</div>
```

---

## About

My PhD and subsequent research have centred on iron deficiency in exercising females — a field defined by chronic underdiagnosis, male-calibrated reference ranges, and a near-total absence of large-scale intervention data.

I have screened over **10,000 females** for health indicators and markers of iron deficiency and anaemia, led the **IRONWOMAN double-blind randomised controlled trial**, and contributed to the Australian and New Zealand consensus position statement on iron in pregnancy. I have published **26 peer-reviewed articles** on women's health, haematology, clinical trials, and related topics.

Currently, I am a Postdoctoral Research Fellow at the Pennington Biomedical Research Centre, focusing on iron regulation, nutrition, and metabolism. My research integrates rigorous biostatistics with translational outcomes — bridging clinical discovery and evidence-based practice.

---

## Research Focus

- **Iron deficiency & women's health** — diagnosis, management, and intervention in active populations
- **Clinical trials** — design, randomisation, longitudinal analysis, IRONWOMAN RCT
- **Systematic reviews & meta-analysis** — evidence synthesis on iron supplementation
- **Population screening** — community-based iron deficiency detection and characterisation
- **Nutrition & exercise physiology** — type 1 diabetes, military nutrition, altitude effects

---

## Statistical Toolkit

```{=html}
<div class="toolkit-row">
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Meta-Analysis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Mixed-Effects Models</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">RCT Design</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Cross-sectional Surveys</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">R Programming</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Data Visualization</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Systematic Review</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Clinical Trial Management</span>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid">
  <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:cory.dugan1@gmail.com">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> cory.dugan1@gmail.com
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/cory-dugan-phd/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="/cv.html">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i> CV
  </a>
</div>
```
